data.name: login_error_password
data.value: password must be at least 8 characters long

data.name: login_error_username
data.value: username must be at least 3 characters long

data.name: setup_error_username
data.value: username must be at least 3 characters long

data.name: setup_error_password
data.value: password must be at least 8 characters long

data.name: setup_error_email
data.value: a valid email address is required
